text:
GG0130B2 Self Care: Oral Hygiene Goal by End of SNF PPS Part A Stay CHAR 2 Indicates the resident's goal to perform oral hygiene tasks by the end of the SNF PPS Part A stay. -=Not assessed/no information
 01=Dependent
 02=Substantial/maximal assistance
 03=Partial/moderate assistance
 04=Supervision or touching assistance
 05=Setup or clean-up assistance
 06=Independent
 ^=Blank (skip pattern) effective 10/01/2016
discontinued 09/30/2024
649 GG0130B3_ORAL_ABILITY_END_CD
